app.title: Go AI Teacher
label.settings_tip: Press Apply after changing settings to reinitialize the analyzer
status.ollama_fallback: Ollama could not finish generation, so a short fallback explanation was used
status.nvidia_fallback: NVIDIA could not finish generation, so a short fallback explanation was used
status.github_fallback: GitHub Models could not finish generation, so a short fallback explanation was used
analysis.chart_title: Full-Game Winrate and Score Lead Trend (click a point to jump)
analysis.teacher_fallback: Final black winrate: {final_wr:.1f}%. The key teaching point is around {blunder}. Review why KataGo's candidate keeps the position steadier, then replay that local area once without looking at the answer.
analysis.teacher_fallback_none: No move crossed the 30% mistake threshold. The game was relatively steady, so review the largest ordinary swings and compare your plans with KataGo's first-choice moves.
teacher.default_message: AI teacher commentary will appear when a key mistake is detected.
teacher.nvidia_fallback: Could not call NVIDIA API, using a short fallback explanation.
teacher.github_fallback: Could not call GitHub Models API, using a short fallback explanation.
teacher.system_prompt: You are a professional Go teacher. Explain Go ideas in a simple, practical way. Reply in English.
teacher.user_prompt:
This is move {turn}.
The student played {user_move}, and this move dropped the winrate by {winrate_drop:.1f}%.
AI recommends {best_move} as the best move.
Explain why {best_move} is better and point out the issue with {user_move}.
Keep it under 80 words and give one direct teaching suggestion.
teacher.memory_hint: The current Ollama model needs too much system memory. Try switching in Analysis > LLM Model to qwen2.5:1.5b, llama3.2:1b, or gemma2:2b.
teacher.model_not_found_hint: Model {model} was not found. You can run: ollama pull {model}
teacher.fallback:
After move {turn} at {user_move}, the winrate dropped by about {winrate_drop:.1f}%. Study AI's recommended {best_move} first and compare how the two moves affect the local shape and whole-board initiative.

{hint}
dialog.new_game_message: The current game has not been saved separately. Clear the board?
dialog.about_message:
Version: Internal Test Build 0.3
Based on KataGo v1.16.4

Features:
• Real-time game analysis
• AI teaching commentary
• Variation support
• SGF / JSON export

Built on:
KataGo: https://github.com/lightvector/KataGo
Ollama: Local LLM Integration
dialog.provider_api_key_env_hint: Hint: API Key is read from system keyring first, then .env / NVIDIA_API_KEY / KATAGO_NVIDIA_API_KEY. Applying NVIDIA saves it to keyring, not .env or ui_settings.json.
dialog.provider_github_token_env_hint: Hint: GitHub token is read from system keyring first, then .env / GITHUB_TOKEN / KATAGO_GITHUB_TOKEN. Applying GitHub Models saves it to keyring, not .env or ui_settings.json.
dialog.ollama_model_confirm_download: Are you sure you want to download {model}?
dialog.ollama_model_download_busy: Another model download is already running.
dialog.ollama_model_missing_prompt:
Model {model} has not been downloaded yet. Download it now?

Choose No to save the setting anyway.
dialog.ollama_install_intro: Ollama was not detected. This project uses a local Ollama instance for LLM commentary. Please install using the steps below:
dialog.ollama_not_detected: Ollama not detected. Please install Ollama and try again.
dialog.shortcuts_message:
Ctrl+N New Game
Ctrl+O Load SGF
Ctrl+S Save SGF As
Ctrl+R Analyze Current Position
Ctrl+Shift+R Full-Game Winrate Analysis
Arrow keys / mouse wheel switch moves and branches
error.nvidia_api_key_empty: NVIDIA API Key cannot be empty
error.nvidia_api_key_invalid: NVIDIA API Key validation failed (please confirm the format is correct)
error.nvidia_api_key_missing_env: NVIDIA is selected, but no NVIDIA API Key is set. Set it in Analysis > LLM Model, or provide NVIDIA_API_KEY / KATAGO_NVIDIA_API_KEY.
error.github_token_invalid: GitHub token validation failed (please confirm the token can access GitHub Models)
error.github_token_missing_env: GitHub Models is selected, but no GitHub token is set. Set it in Analysis > LLM Model, or provide GITHUB_TOKEN / KATAGO_GITHUB_TOKEN.
